    Fields in com.example.escriturarapida.controller declared as AudioManager
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private AudioManager
    GameController.audioManager
    Shared audio manager instance injected via GameController.setAudioManager(AudioManager).
    private AudioManager

    Shared audio manager instance injected via PauseController.setAudioManager(AudioManager).

    Shared audio manager injected via StartController.setAudioManager(AudioManager).
    Methods in com.example.escriturarapida.controller with parameters of type AudioManager
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    GameController.setAudioManager(AudioManager audioManager)
    Receives the shared AudioManager instance from the previous scene.
    void
    PauseController.setAudioManager(AudioManager audioManager)
    Receives the shared AudioManager instance from the previous scene.
    void
    StartController.setAudioManager(AudioManager audioManager)
    Injects the shared AudioManager instance into this controller and sets the audio state to MENU, triggering an update so the correct background music plays while the start screen is active.

    GameView.changeScene(String fxmlPath, javafx.scene.Node node, AudioManager audioManager)
    Loads an FXML scene and sets it on the current stage.
